title: BLDP Product Development and Technology Roadmap
text: Ballard Power Systems advanced product portfolio with significant achievements in fuel cell engine design and manufacturing. The FCmove SC platform achieved 40% reduction in total part count while improving performance and durability characteristics. The 9th generation FCmove-XD engine was launched, representing latest advancement in design efficiency. Product development rationalization during 2024-2025 restructuring focused spending on high-ROI platform extensions. Manufacturing improvements enabled cost reductions supporting margin recovery goals. The company focuses on three core engine platforms serving different customer segments: FCmove-HD+ (heavy-duty), FCmove-SC (medium-duty buses), and specialty engines for stationary and niche applications. Partnerships with component suppliers and system integrators accelerated development of integrated powertrain solutions. The company targets 40% reduction in total cost per megawatt through manufacturing efficiency and design optimization. Investment in autonomous manufacturing capabilities and supply chain optimization aims to achieve competitive manufacturing cost structure. Product roadmap extends through 2027 with focus on cost reduction, reliability improvement, and service capability expansion to support fleet scaling and transition toward profitability.
